name: Containerlab Free Labs
postCreateCommand: containerlab version && docker pull frrouting/frr:latest && docker pull alpine:latest && bash /workspaces/containerlab-free-labs/build-frr-ssh.sh && echo '' && echo '🤖 Damira AI is installed! Get your free API key:' && echo '   1. Sign up at https://damiraai.com (free, no credit card)' && echo '   2. Copy your API key from the dashboard' && echo '   3. VS Code Settings → search Damira → paste key' && echo '   4. Open the Damira chat panel and start asking questions' && echo ''
